ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenRA/OpenRA
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenRA/OpenRA
Language: c%23
Open Source real-time strategy game engine for early Westwood games such as Command & Conquer: Red Alert written in C# using SDL and OpenGL. Runs on Windows, Linux, *BSD and Mac OS X.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PintaProject/Pinta
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PintaProject/Pinta
Language: c%23
Simple GTK Paint Program

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Prowlarr/Prowlarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Prowlarr/Prowlarr
Language: c%23
Prowlarr is an indexer manager/proxy built on the popular *arr .net/reactjs base stack to integrate with your various PVR apps, supporting management of both Torrent Trackers and Usenet Indexers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Seafoam-Labs/Shelly-ALPM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Seafoam-Labs/Shelly-ALPM
Language: c%23
Pacman alternative for ArchLinux, designed with you in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Seralyth/Seralyth-Menu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Seralyth/Seralyth-Menu
Language: c%23
A community driven mod menu for Gorilla Tag with over 1000+ mods

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SirDiabo/GithubLauncher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SirDiabo/GithubLauncher
Language: c%23
A Launcher that Downloads and Updates Applications from Github Releases

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Sonarr/Sonarr
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Sonarr/Sonarr
Language: c%23
Smart PVR for newsgroup and bittorrent users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: UnderminersTeam/UndertaleModTool
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/UnderminersTeam/UndertaleModTool
Language: c%23
The most complete tool for modding, decompiling and unpacking Undertale (and other GameMaker games!)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WalletWasabi/WalletWasabi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WalletWasabi/WalletWasabi
Language: c%23
Open-source, non-custodial, privacy preserving Bitcoin wallet for Windows, Linux, and Mac.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: babalae/better-genshin-impact
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/babalae/better-genshin-impact
Language: c%23
📦BetterGI · 更好的原神 - 自动拾取 | 自动剧情 | 全自动钓鱼(AI) | 全自动七圣召唤 | 自动伐木 | 自动刷本 | 自动采集/挖矿/锄地 | 一条龙 | 全连音游 | 自动烹饪 - UI Automation Testing Tools For Genshin Impact

ns0:entry.ns0:title: builtbybel/FluentCleaner
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/builtbybel/FluentCleaner
Language: c%23
A real WinUI desktop cleaner with terminal control and multi-database support

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/msbuild
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/msbuild
Language: c%23
The Microsoft Build Engine (MSBuild) is the build platform for .NET and Visual Studio.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/roslyn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn
Language: c%23
The Roslyn .NET compiler provides C# and Visual Basic languages with rich code analysis APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/k1tbyte/Wand-Enhancer
Language: c%23
Advanced UX and interoperability extension for Wand (WeMod) app

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/semantic-kernel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/semantic-kernel
Language: c%23
Integrate cutting-edge LLM technology quickly and easily into your apps

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ppy/osu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ppy/osu
Language: c%23
rhythm is just a *click* away!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: seerge/g-helper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/seerge/g-helper
Language: c%23
Lightweight Armoury Crate alternative for Asus laptops with nearly the same functionality. Works with ROG Zephyrus, Flow, TUF, Strix, Scar, ProArt, Vivobook, Zenbook, Expertbook, ROG Ally, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: space-wizards/RobustToolbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/space-wizards/RobustToolbox
Language: c%23
Robust multiplayer game engine, used by Space Station 14

ns0:entry.ns0:title: space-wizards/space-station-14
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/space-wizards/space-station-14
Language: c%23
A multiplayer game about paranoia and chaos on a space station. Remake of the cult-classic Space Station 13.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tModLoader/tModLoader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tModLoader/tModLoader
Language: c%23
A mod to make and play Terraria mods. Supports Terraria 1.4 (and earlier) installations

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tui-cs/Terminal.Gui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tui-cs/Terminal.Gui
Language: c%23
Cross Platform Terminal UI toolkit for .NET
